caps.proposition_text: Ms. Martinez reports a fall after hitting her arm on a pole.

evidence.span_text: Ms. Martinez is a 43-year-old female who presents today for an evaluation of right arm pain after she hitting her arm on a pole while playing tennis. She had mild swelling at the time. There is pain with motion. She denies any numbness or tingling in her hand. She has a past medical history of allergies and takes Flonase.

caps.proposition_text: Examination of the left wrist shows tenderness over the distal radius.

evidence.span_text: Examination of the left wrist shows tenderness over the distal radius and pain with flexion of the wrist and thumb.

caps.proposition_text: There is pain with flexion of the wrist and thumb.
